title: Saddlemates
writer: William Colt MacDonald, Bernard McConville, Karen DeWolf
actors: Robert Livingston, Bob Steele, Rufe Davis
plot: When a strip of land along the Red River is declared in Indian Territory instead of Texas, the Rangers leave and the Army moves in. Now ex-rangers the Mesquiteers stay on as scouts. The new Colonel plans to make peace with the Ind...
